description_i18n.zh-TW: 輸入統一編號(統編)後同時呈現經濟部商業登記、司法院案件紀錄、政府電子採購得標紀錄三個來源,示範 join_datasets MCP 工具的單一面板查詢模式。展示用樣本資料,正式部署需連線至載入相關資料集的 Taiwan Data Hub 後端。
description_i18n.en: Type a 統一編號 (Taiwan tax ID) and see MOEA business registry + Judicial Yuan case records + Public-Construction Commission procurement awards in one view — the join_datasets MCP-tool pattern visualised. Ships with sample data for four well-known public companies; production deployments need a Taiwan Data Hub backend with the matching datasets loaded.
